summary: Backend refactoring Phase 2 testing complete - All migrated routes (admin.py, marketplace.py) working correctly. Login, marketplace providers API, and provider navigation verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Modular router migration successful - admin.py and marketplace.py properly integrated via init_dependencies() pattern
Dependencies initialized correctly in server.py before router imports (lines 1408-1431)
All marketplace endpoints (/api/marketplace/providers, /api/marketplace/provider/{user_id}) functioning identically to pre-migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring Phase 2 complete. Admin routes at /api/admin/* and Marketplace routes at /api/marketplace/* now served from modular routers. All APIs return identical responses to pre-migration. Frontend navigation (Dashboard, Clients, Client Detail) all working.

dashboard_navigation.evidence: Screenshot shows Doula Dashboard with 4 Active Clients, metrics, and Quick Actions

clients_list_navigation.evidence: Screenshot shows My Clients page with 7 Active Clients including Olivia Davis, Charlotte Taylor, Emma Johnson

client_detail_navigation.evidence: Screenshot shows Client Details for Olivia Davis with all sections (Timeline, Appointments, Notes, Messages, Contracts, Invoices)

architecture_notes.modular_routes: Admin and Marketplace routes migrated to /app/backend/routes/admin.py and /app/backend/routes/marketplace.py
architecture_notes.dependencies: Shared dependencies managed via /app/backend/routes/dependencies.py with init_dependencies() pattern
architecture_notes.integration: Routers included in server.py after dependency initialization
